TS-12.title: Remove unused imports from __main__.py and update tests
TS-12.acceptance_criteria: __main__.py does NOT import parse_args or warn_if_exposed; main() still delegates to _server_main(); test_package.py and test_server.py tests updated to not assert those imports; all tests pass
TS-12.design_section:
## Entry Point
__main__.py delegates entirely to server.main(). No config imports needed at the __main__ level.

TS-22.title: Fix SIGTERM handler to raise SystemExit(0)
TS-22.acceptance_criteria: _handle_sigterm sets _shutdown and _wake events then raises SystemExit(0); SIGINT handler same; SIGUSR1 unchanged; signal tests updated to assertRaises(SystemExit); new test verifies exit code 0
TS-22.design_section:
## Signal Handling
SIGTERM/SIGINT: set shutdown events (belt-and-suspenders for daemon poll thread), then raise SystemExit(0) which propagates through serve_forever(). SIGUSR1: wake poll thread only.

TS-23.title: Build polyglot extraction harness for _maybe_fetch_quota testing
TS-23.acceptance_criteria: Test harness reads scripts/tmux-claude-status, extracts _maybe_fetch_quota function definition from embedded Python block, makes it callable via compile()+exec(); canary assertions verify extraction; existing _maybe_fetch_quota_impl replaced with extracted version; scripts/tmux-claude-status NOT modified
TS-23.design_section:
## Client Fetch
_maybe_fetch_quota is embedded in the bash/python polyglot. Extract only that function (not full block due to bash $TRANSCRIPT interpolation). Key off 'def _maybe_fetch_quota' and extract to next module-level definition.

TS-13.title: Refactor _org_uuid from module global to QuotaServer instance state
TS-13.acceptance_criteria: scraper.py has no module-level _org_uuid or global _org_uuid; fetch_quota(session_key, org_uuid=None) returns (result_dict, new_org_uuid) tuple; QuotaServer.__init__ sets self._org_uuid=None; _do_scrape passes/stores org_uuid; caching semantics preserved (skip discovery when cached, clear on 401/403); all setUp resets of scraper._org_uuid removed; all tests pass
TS-13.design_section:
## Scraper State
fetch_quota becomes stateless: accepts org_uuid parameter, returns (result, new_org_uuid) tuple. QuotaServer owns the state via self._org_uuid. No Scraper class needed.
